assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-11: 'Check out the target branch (feature branch TC-9005): git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' — explicitly checks out TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 20-24: 'The PR must target the feature branch TC-9005 (not main)' with command 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Explicitly states --base TC-9005 and notes it follows constraint 3.3.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 14-18: 'Create the task branch from the feature branch: git checkout -b TC-9205' — the task branch is named TC-9205 (task issue ID), distinct from the target branch TC-9005. Line 18 states: 'The task branch is named after the Jira issue ID per convention (constraint 3.1).'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 28-33 in 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' section lists all three files: 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs — the existing migration, to understand the pattern', 'migration/src/lib.rs — to understand how migrations are registered', 'entity/src/advisory.rs — to verify the advisory entity no longer references the status column'. Line 28 cites constraint 5.2.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 84: 'The commit would include --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" per constraint 2.3.'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 71-82 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' as the subject line (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat' and scope 'migration'), and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205'.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 9: 'Check out the target branch (feature branch TC-9005)'. Line 20: 'The PR must target the feature branch TC-9005 (not main), because the task's Target Branch is TC-9005'. Line 24: 'This follows constraint 3.3: gh pr create MUST always specify --base <target-branch> matching the task's Target Branch value.' The plan clearly identifies and references TC-9005 as the Target Branch from the task description.
